hero.description: Experience a vibrant 100-acre campus in Bangalore where academic excellence meets a dynamic student community. From world-class facilities to diverse student activities, this is more than a campus — it's your home.

header.title: Campus
header.description: Explore world-class infrastructure designed to support academic excellence and student life.

facilitiesSection.intro: Presidency University offers a modern campus equipped with advanced academic, recreational, and support facilities to enhance student learning and overall experience.

items.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
items.desc: Fully networked campus across academic and residential buildings

items.title: Computer Labs
items.desc: Advanced labs with latest hardware and licensed software

items.title: AI & Robotics Labs
items.desc: Dedicated labs for AI, ML, IoT, VLSI, and Robotics

items.title: Design Labs
items.desc: Specialised SOD labs for communication, fashion, product, and space design

items.title: Media Labs
items.desc: Studios supporting journalism and mass communication students

items.title: Moot Court
items.desc: Practical legal training facility for law students

items.title: Central Library
items.desc: Digital resources, journals, and online searchable access

items.title: Sports Complex
items.desc: Indoor and outdoor sports & athletics facilities

items.title: Auditoriums
items.desc: Multiple seminar halls and large event spaces

items.title: Wellness Centre
items.desc: Student health and wellbeing support services

header.title: Student
header.description: Comfortable, secure, and modern accommodation designed for student life.

content: Presidency University provides safe, modern on-campus residential facilities designed to offer a comfortable and secure living experience for students.
Spread across dedicated hostel blocks for male and female students, the campus accommodation eliminates the stress of commuting while fostering a vibrant community environment.
Rooms are available in twin and triple-sharing formats, fully furnished with beds, study tables, storage, and Wi-Fi access.
For students preferring off-campus options, assistance is available to find reliable accommodation near Yelahanka and Bangalore.

features.title: Modern Rooms
features.desc: Twin & triple-sharing rooms with furniture and Wi-Fi

features.title: Dining Facilities
features.desc: Four meals daily with veg & non-veg options

features.title: 24/7 Security
features.desc: CCTV, wardens, and emergency medical support

features.title: Transport Access
features.desc: Weekend transport for shopping and city access

header.title: Student Clubs &
header.description: Explore student clubs in Bangalore university life with diverse extracurricular activities that shape leadership, creativity, and innovation.

clubsSection.intro: Life at Presidency extends far beyond the lecture hall. The Department of Student Affairs (DSA) coordinates over 50 active clubs across cultural, technical, social, and management domains. Every Friday, structured activities and events keep student life engaging throughout the year, along with festivals, national celebrations, talk series, and leadership sessions.

events.title: Kaleidoscope
events.desc: The flagship campus cultural festival attracting students from universities across India.

events.title: TechBiz
events.desc: An annual 24-hour tech and business challenge fostering innovation and collaboration.

events.title: Eunoia
events.desc: A vibrant arts festival celebrating creativity, expression, and talent.
